name: localhost-ai-hub
description: AI Hub with Express Gateway & React Dashboard

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd gateway && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build-all: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.build:gateway: cd gateway && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:dashboard: cd dashboard && npm run build && cd ..

author: Arnav Bhargava
